programme.title: 14 Love Letters
programme.desc: After historic love letters start anonymously appearing in Kallie Sharp's mailbox, the hobby farmer searches for her secret admirer and opens herself up to love.

programme.title: A Second Chance at Love
programme.desc: With her marriage amiss, a woman immerses herself in her divorced parents' affairs by setting them up through a dating app.

programme.title: Fashionably Yours
programme.desc: After three years of organizing fashion collections at a top magazine, Lauren is passed up for a promotion and decides it is finally time to throw in the towel and move home.

programme.title: Love Blossoms
programme.desc: A perfume maker wants to finish a formula left behind by her late father. She gets help from an inexperienced botanist with an uncanny sense of smell.

programme.title: For Love & Honor
programme.desc: A by-the-book veteran takes over at a failing military academy and immediately clashes with the beautiful dean of academics. Eventually, sparks fly as they're forced to become close to save their school.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth focuses on teaching Angela how to read braille; Rosemary and Lee struggle to give Rachel the freedom she was promised; Bill feels displaced when he's asked to return his Mountie uniform.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth is distraught over the reveal of Nathan's secret; everyone helps a couple prepare for their wedding; the bachelor and bachelorette parties stir up mixed emotions from the guests; a mysterious businessman arrives in town.

programme.title: So You Said Yes

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Campfire Kiss
programme.desc: Feeling disconnected with her teenage son, a protective mother decides to step outside of her comfort zone and take him camping. But as soon as she arrives, she begins butting heads with her cabin neighbor, a single father and outdoors man, who is also in search of a connection with his teen daughter.

programme.title: Her Pen Pal
programme.desc: An event planner can't wait to attend -- and plan -- her best friend's wedding in Paris. However, when she finds out her ex is bringing a date, she reconnects with her French childhood pen pal.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Wedding
programme.desc: A meddling woman wins her sister an all-expenses-paid wedding in Beverly Hills, Calif., but soon learns her ex is also helping plan the ceremony.

programme.title: Love by Chance
programme.desc: Claire, the owner of a new restaurant, is too busy to focus on relationships. Her mother decides to fix this by finding Claire the perfect man -- without telling Claire.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My Christmas Love
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic (Meredith Hagner) begins receiving the gifts from The 12 Days of Christmas from an anonymous suitor.

programme.title: The Christmas Club
programme.desc: Two busy strangers meet when they help an elderly woman find her lost Christmas savings. Thanks to fate and Christmas magic, they also find something they were both missing: true love.

programme.desc: Townspeople rescue a mute boy whom a carnival owner has been using as an attraction.
